authorizationType.description: The method's authorization type. Valid values are NONE, AWS_IAM, CUSTOM, or COGNITO_USER_POOLS.

authorizerId.description: The identifier of an Authorizer to use on this method.

apiKeyRequired.description: Whether the method requires an API key.

operationName.description: A human-friendly operation identifier for the method.

requestParameters.description: Request parameters that can be accepted by the method. Keys identify the parameter location and name.

requestModels.description: Specifies the Model resources used for the request's content type.

methodResponses.description: Method responses keyed by status code.
